advancements.functional_trims.full_quart: Equip a full set of Quartz-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.redstone.r: Power a Redstone Lamp with Redstone-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.emerald.1_: Open a Loot Chest while wearing Emerald-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.lapis.leve: Reach level 100 while wearing Lapis-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.lapis.firs: Absorb an Experience Orb while wearing Lapis-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.gold.enter: Enter a Bastion Remnant while wearing Gold-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.gold.attac: Attack a Piglin Brute while wearing Gold-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.diamond.ar: Take fatal damage while wearing Diamond-trimmed armor
Completely resist an explosion with Netherite-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.iron.refle: Reflect a projectile with Iron-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.iron.knock: Knock back an attacker with your shield while wearing Iron-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.copper.str: Get struck by Lightning while wearing Copper-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.copper.mac: Deal 20 damage to a mob with the Mace while supercharged
advancements.functional_trims.amethyst.w: Stay still and sense the echoes around you
advancements.functional_trims.amethyst.i: Sense an invisible mob with Amethyst Vision
advancements.functional_trims.resin.stic: Stick to a wall by crouching with Resin-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.resin.long: Break a 100-block fall by sticking to a wall
advancements.functional_trims.quartz.eat: Eat a Golden Carrot while wearing Quartz-trimmed armor
advancements.functional_trims.quartz.dri: Consume a potion while wearing Quartz-trimmed armor
config.functional_trims.title: Functional Trims Config
config.functional_trims.iron.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Unyielding Defense"
Shield has no cooldown and knocks enemies back.
Incoming projectiles may be deflected.
Critical hits deal reduced damage.
config.functional_trims.gold.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Lord of the Nether"
Piglins become completely passive.
config.functional_trims.diamond.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Shattering Resilience"
Armor shatters to prevent fatal damage.
config.functional_trims.netherite.toolti:
Full Set Effect: "Immovable Object"
You become completely immune to knockback.
config.functional_trims.redstone.power: Redstone Power Level when Stepped On
config.functional_trims.redstone.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Fully Conductive"
Blocks you step on emit a redstone signal.
config.functional_trims.emerald.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Explorer’s Fortune"
Loot Chests grant more loot per chest.
config.functional_trims.lapis.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Scholar’s Insight"
Experience Orbs grant more experience.
config.functional_trims.quartz.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Enriched Vitality"
Food restores more saturation and hunger.
Potions last longer.
config.functional_trims.amethyst.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Resonating Vision"
See mobs through walls while motionless.
config.functional_trims.copper.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Supercharged Strike"
Lightning strikes may supercharge you.
Your next attack becomes stronger.
Lightning strikes you more often.
config.functional_trims.resin.tooltip:
Full Set Effect: "Adhesive Grip"
Stick to walls when sneaking next to them.
